title: 10 Signs a Godly Man Has the Mercy Backwards
caption:
Most guys have the mercy running backwards. Ruthless with everyone else, gentle with themselves.

Grace for your own sin, law for his. Patience for your excuses, none for your family. A godly man flips it: the hardest judge in the room on himself, the easiest on the guy next to him.

How many of these ten are actually you?

#faith #humility #christianman #godlyman #grace
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
